ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Contract Signed for PE service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Signed") && (ISNULL(Actual_Start_Date__c) || ISNULL(Contract_Customer_Signed_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Actual Start Date and Contract Signed Date.
